title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono, founding mathematician at Axiom Math, argues that humans cannot compete with AI on raw knowledge and that true intelligence in the age of AI lies in curiosity, human judgment, and the capacity to discover new talent and ideas. Drawing on Srinivasa Ramanujan's legacy, he contends that education and human expertise must evolve beyond knowledge transfer.
